Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.BlobPart

Packages that use BlobPart
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides classes related to web grounding and RAG.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part
Provides base classes and factories for rendering individual parts of an ASI message.

    Subclasses of BlobPart in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ModelBlobPart
    A specialized BlobPart for binary content generated by the model, including internal thought process details.
    class 
    UserBlobPart
    A concrete BlobPart implementation for binary content provided by the user.
